name: Noose of Sin
overview: Bangkok Rattanakosin era, 116, or about the year 1898 during the reign of the fifth Lord Suradej (Ayothaya) gave landholders and property everything, including an attendant slave to his only son is Khunphithak. Lady Jewell, his wife, filled with anxiety knowing that fact Khunphithak son is not robust. They live happy life from day to day, but the last in the frame for fear of his father's prestige.

trailers.title: เบื้องหลัง หลุดๆ ฮาๆ บ่วงบาป ชุด 2
